title: Refactor hub-utils.tsx into focused utility modules
description: The hub-utils.tsx file exports many helper functions extracted from various places, making it a dumping ground. Split it into domain-specific utility files (e.g., math-utils.tsx, string-utils.tsx, array-utils.tsx) to improve maintainability.

title: Implement smarter timing for re-enabling real-time chat history updates
description: The TODO in use-realtime-chat-history.ts suggests re-enabling a feature with smarter timing (e.g., only after history confirms the message). Implement a mechanism that waits for message confirmation before re-enabling real-time updates to reduce unnecessary fetches.

title: Add proper error handling for missing assistant reply in session-send
description: The route /api/session-send has a XXX comment indicating a missing error handling case where the sender never sees their assistant reply. Add proper error handling and user feedback for this scenario.
